image:image.image:title: Live Gully Cricket Scorer Official Premium Logo
image:image.image:caption: Official branding logo for Live Gully Cricket Scorer, the premium local cricket scoring and tournament management web application.

image:image.image:title: Manage Local Cricket Tournaments Easily Dashboard
image:image.image:caption: Live Gully Cricket Scorer Home Dashboard - Manage local tennis ball cricket tournaments, check live scores, and access quick organizer tools.

image:image.image:title: Live Ball-by-Ball Cricket Scoring App Interface
image:image.image:caption: Live Cricket Scoring UI - Score gully cricket matches live with precise ball-by-ball updates, live run rates, partnerships, and over trackers.

image:image.image:title: Automatic Points Tables & Tournament Standings
image:image.image:caption: Cricket Points Table Generator - Track tournament rankings with automatic standings and a built-in Net Run Rate (NRR) calculator algorithm.

image:image.image:title: Access Previous Matches and Digital Scorecards
image:image.image:caption: Cricket Match History - Access previous match records, comprehensive digital scorecards, match summaries, and overall player tournament history.

image:image.image:title: DLS Calculator for Rain Affected Gully Cricket Matches
image:image.image:caption: Universal DLS Target Calculator - Instantly calculate revised cricket targets for rain-affected or suspended local matches using the exact Duckworth-Lewis-Stern method.

image:image.image:title: Invite Friends to the Cricket Community and Earn Cash
image:image.image:caption: Refer and Earn Rewards Online - Invite local cricket players to the Live Gully Cricket Scorer platform and earn real cash straight to your UPI account.

image:image.image:title: Pabitra Mondal - Lead Full-Stack Developer
image:image.image:caption: Pabitra Mondal, Lead Full-Stack Developer, Computer Science Student, and Creator of the Live Gully Cricket Scorer ecosystem.
